resources.string: Sign in to manage your bookings.
Sign up to book your first cleaning.
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a verification code to reset your password.
Verification code sent. Check your email.
Password changed. You can sign in now.
Could not send the code. Try again later.
Could not change the password. Check the code and try again.
We sent a verification code to %1$s. Didn\'t receive it? Check your spam folder or resend below.
We\'ve sent a 6-digit verification code to your email. Enter the code below to verify your account.
No Google account on this device. Add one in Settings → Accounts and try again.
Google sign-in isn\'t configured for this build.
Couldn\'t sign in with Google. Try again or use email.
Perks and recognition for loyal customers
You\'ve unlocked all tiers — thank you!
Guaranteed same-day slots & early access to new services
They get a welcome treat, you get a free add-on.
Be the first — share your code
Tap to book your first session.
Save on every cleaning. 14 days free.
15% off your first cleaning with WELCOME15
You both get 150 points after they book
Set up a recurring cleaning — book once, run forever
Give a treat, get a free add-on
%1$d more bookings to unlock the next tier
Window + upholstery combo — +450 CZK this month
Book a vetted cleaner. Transparent pricing, no phone calls.
Carpets, upholstery, windows — all in a single visit.
Not happy? We\'ll come back and make it right.
Your booked cleanings will show up here.
Check your internet connection and try again.
Free cancellation — you\'ll get a full refund.
Free cancellation — you booked less than 15 minutes ago.
100%% cancellation fee. No refund is available this close to the cleaning.
Estimated — final amount confirmed after you submit.
Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
Please describe what happened so we can improve.
Order cancelled. Refund of %1$s is on its way.
No PDF viewer found on your device.
Receipt will be available once your cleaning is completed.
You\'ll be signed out of this device. Your bookings and rewards stay on your account — just sign in again to pick up where you left off.
Verified email, cannot be changed here
Pick one or type your own
Preselected when you book a cleaning
When a cleaner is assigned, on the way, or done
Ask for feedback after each cleaning
When a refund is issued to your card
When you reach a new loyalty tier
When support responds to your dispute
Typically replies within a few minutes
How do I cancel my booking?
Open your booking from the Orders tab and tap \"Cancel\". Cancellations free of charge up to 24 hours before the cleaning start time.
What if I\'m not home when the cleaner arrives?
Add access instructions when booking (e.g., door code, key location). Cleaners wait up to 15 minutes; if we can\'t reach you, the booking may be cancelled.
Yes. All Cleansia cleaners are background-checked and covered by insurance up to 1,000,000 CZK per booking.
From the Orders tab, open the upcoming booking and tap \"Reschedule\". Free rescheduling up to 12 hours before the cleaning.
What\'s included in a standard cleaning?
Kitchen (countertops, sink, appliances exterior), bathrooms (toilet, shower, tiles), all floors, dusting, general tidying. Extras like oven cleaning are available as add-ons.
Pick how the app looks. System matches your device setting.
Easy on the eyes at night
We\'ll email you a verification code, then you can set a new password.
Enter the code from the email we just sent you.
All slots booked for this day — try another date.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before
You get %1$d hours of free cancellation as a Plus member.
Pick from saved or add new
Move the map to set location
Couldn\'t get your location. Make sure GPS is on and try again.
Location permission denied. Enable it in Settings to use My location.
Type at least 2 characters to search
You haven\'t saved any addresses yet
We don\'t currently serve this city. Try a different address or check back later.
%1$s will be removed from your saved addresses.
Toggle the add-ons you\'d like. Prices update live.
Loyalty discount applies on orders above %d CZK
Order doesn\'t meet the minimum for this code
Code doesn\'t apply to this currency
Couldn\'t validate code. Please try again.
Got a code from a friend or campaign? Enter it here.
Have a friend\'s code? Both of you earn 150 bonus tier-points after your first cleaning.
Code from %1$s accepted — you\'ll both get 150 bonus points.
Plus benefit · choose someone who\'s cleaned for you before
Code accepted — you\'ll both get 150 bonus points.
How do you want to pay?
Your cleaning is booked. Sit back and relax.
A cleaner will pick up your order soon — you\'ll get a notification when they\'re on the way.
Please sign in to complete your booking.
Please select a cleaning date and time.
Please add a phone number to your profile so we can reach you about this booking.
Please complete your profile before booking — we need your phone number to reach you.
A few quick details so we can serve you better. You can skip and fill these in later.
Include your country code (e.g. +420). We\'ll only use this to reach you about your bookings.
This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Check your internet connection and try again.
Server is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
Payment cancelled. You can try again.
Payment failed. Please try again or use a different card.
A better way to keep your home clean
Cancel anytime. Your subscription renews automatically until you cancel.
Across all your bookings, on top of any other discount
Then %1$s / month. Cancel anytime before the trial ends and you won\'t be charged.
Then %1$s / year. Cancel anytime before the trial ends and you won\'t be charged.
Free for the first %1$d days. After that, your card is billed automatically. Cancel anytime before the trial ends.
You\'ll be charged the prorated difference today, then %1$s per year. Your benefits keep going.
Request the same cleaner you trust on every booking.
Set it once — every other Tuesday at 10am, automatically.
Cancel up to 4 hours before your cleaning, no fees.
Discount applies on top of your loyalty tier.
One free same-day booking per month, no surcharge.
5% off, free cancellation, your favorite cleaner.
Save on every booking · cancel anytime · recurring cleanings
Your benefits are active right away. Here\'s what just unlocked:
Plus benefits stop on this date.
Your benefits remain until the end of the current billing period. You won\'t be charged again.
Manage your weekly or biweekly cleanings
Set up a weekly or biweekly cleaning from a past order to skip the booking flow each time.
No new cleanings will be auto-booked from this schedule.
Cleanings already on your calendar stay booked — cancel them individually from Orders if you no longer want them.
Tip: Pause instead if you only want to skip a few weeks.
Add a saved address from your profile first.
Couldn\'t create the schedule. Try again.
Your session expired. Please sign in again.
This account uses Google sign-in. Use the Google button.
Use email and password to sign in for this account.
This code is invalid or has expired.
Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
Password must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
Please choose a password different from your old one.
You don\'t have permission to do that.
Your session expired. Please sign in again.
For your security, you\'ve been signed out everywhere.
An account with this email already exists.
No account found with this email.
This phone number is already in use.
Date must be in the past.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Please enter a valid ZIP code.
Couldn\'t send email. Try again later.
Please select a saved address or enter a new one.
Date must be in the future.
This time is too close. Please choose a later slot.
This booking is in progress and can\'t be cancelled.
Your order is empty. Please add at least one service.
One of the selected packages is no longer available.
One of the selected services is no longer available.
No cleaners are available for that slot. Please pick another time.
You\'ve reached the weekly booking limit.
This time conflicts with another booking.
Price changed. Please refresh and try again.
Couldn\'t create booking. Please try again.
Please provide a label for this address.
You already have this address saved.
Address is too short or too long.
Couldn\'t export your data. Please try again.
Couldn\'t delete your account. Please contact support.
Your deletion request is already being processed.
Some items from your previous booking are no longer available.
If something goes wrong with a cleaning, you can file a dispute from the order details.
Open this from an order\'s details to file a dispute.
Tell us the details — what went wrong, when, and what you\'d like us to do.
Can\'t submit without an order — open this from an order\'s details.
No app available to open this file.
You\'ve reached the top — thank you!
No activity yet. Book your first cleaning to start earning.
Couldn\'t load your rewards. Try again.
Share your code. They get 150 bonus points on their first cleaning, you get 150 too.
Get 150 bonus points on your first Cleansia cleaning! Use my code %1$s at signup: %2$s
Be the first — share your code
%1$d friend joined — waiting on first booking
Couldn\'t open share. Code copied to clipboard.
Code from %1$s — you\'ll get 150 bonus points
This referral code is no longer active
Couldn\'t validate code. You can still continue.
Updates when a cleaner accepts or starts your booking.
Notifies you when your booking is finished.
Notifies you when support responds to your dispute.
Your booking #%1$s is confirmed. Tap to see the details.
Your cleaner is heading to your booking #%1$s.
Your cleaner is on it for booking #%1$s. Tap to follow along.
Your booking #%1$s is complete. Tap to leave a review.
Booking #%1$s was cancelled. Tap to see what happened.
Your refund for booking #%1$s is being processed.
You have a new message about your dispute. Tap to read.
Your recurring booking #%1$s is tomorrow. Tap to confirm and pay.
Welcome to %1$s — your new perks are waiting.
Your subscription renews in 3 days. Manage your plan in the app.
Your subscription has ended. Resubscribe to keep your Plus perks.
Devices signed in to your account. Removing a device signs it out and stops its notifications.
We couldn\'t load your devices. Check your connection and try again.
%1$s will be signed out and will stop receiving notifications.
This device will be removed and you\'ll be signed out immediately.
This device is no longer registered.
Please select an address from the suggestions.
Too many attempts with this code. Request a new code and try again.
Dispute already exists for this order
This dispute belongs to a different account.
This consent has already been granted.
Your account can\'t be deleted yet — there is an open invoice.
Your account can\'t be deleted yet — there is an active order.
You already have an active membership.
You can review an order only after it\'s completed.
The selected cleaner isn\'t available for this order.
The end date must be after the start date.
Select at least one service or package.
This recurring cleaning belongs to a different account.
The selected address no longer exists.
The start date can\'t be in the past.
The refund could not be processed. Please try again.
There is nothing left to refund on this order.
This order is not eligible for a refund.
We\'ll let you know when there\'s an update about your cleanings.
